mapper.select:
SELECT dspd.id, dspd.commodity_id, dspd.planned_quantity, dspd.actual_quantity, dspd.unit_price, dspd.planned_amount, dspd.actual_amount, dspd.estimated_material_cost, dspd.actual_material_cost, dspd.sold_quantity, dspd.remaining_quantity, dspd.remark, dspd.create_date, dspd.update_date, dspd.DATE,
ci.`name`, ci.images FROM daily_supply_plan_detail dspd LEFT JOIN commodity_info ci ON (ci.id = dspd.commodity_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ci.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.name},'%')
AND dspd.DATE = #{queryForm.date}
ORDER BY dspd.DATE DESC
